achievements.description: Capture Dialga by interacting with the blue portal atop Spear Pillar.

achievements.description: Capture Mesprit after tracking it down.

achievements.description: Capture Azelf in the cave at Lake Valor.

achievements.title: Sweet Dreams
achievements.description: Capture Cresselia after tracking it down.

achievements.description: Capture Zapdos after tracking it down.

achievements.description: Capture Moltres after tracking it down.

achievements.description: Capture Drifloon by going outside of Valley Windworks on a Friday.

achievements.description: Capture Rotom by interacting with the possessed TV in the Old Chateau.

achievements.description: Capture a level 100 Magikarp while fishing at the Resort Area.

achievements.title: Not You Again!
achievements.description: Capture a Feebas while fishing in Mt. Coronet.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Glutton for Honey
achievements.description: Capture a Munchlax from a honey tree.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Shiny Hunter
achievements.description: Find and capture a Shiny Pokémon.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Learning to Interrobang
achievements.description: Capture an ! or ? Unown.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.description: Trade a Machop for Abra in Oreburgh City.

achievements.description: Trade a Buizel for Chatot in the Eterna Condominiums.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.description: Trade a Medicham for Haunter in Snowpoint City.

achievements.title: Omelette du Fromage
achievements.description: Trade a Finneon for a German Magikarp on Route 226.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Evolution Methods Not Included!
achievements.description: Obtain an Eevee from Bebe in Hearthome City.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: No Gambling Required
achievements.description: Obtain a free Porygon in Veilstone City.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: An Aura is Emanating
achievements.description: Obtain an Egg from Riley on Iron Island.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Regirock
achievements.description: "Solve" Regirock's puzzle in a special cave on Route 228...
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Regice
achievements.description: "Solve" Regice's puzzle in a special cave in Mt. Coronet...
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Registeel
achievements.description: "Solve" Registeel's puzzle in a special cave on Iron Island...
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Regigigas
achievements.description: "It's the statue of a Pokemon... It seems to exude power..."
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Shaymin
achievements.description: "Without any further ado, I'd like you to examine this stone tablet..."
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Darkrai
achievements.description: "The door is tightly shut... It appears impossible to open."
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Arceus
achievements.description: "The flute is making a sound... but it failed!"
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memory of Spiritomb
achievements.description: "There is a broken, crumbling tower... There seems to be a spot that would be a perfect fit for the Odd Keystone."
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Memories of Hoenn and Kanto
achievements.description: "Pokémon from around the country can be brought here..."
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Luck of the Draw
achievements.description: Win any prize from the Jubilife TV Lottery.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Getting the Scoop
achievements.description: Show a Pokemon to The Newspaper Company in Solaceon Town.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: The Starlys and the Combees
achievements.description: Obtain a Macho Brace from a house in Pastoria City.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Friendship Is Great
achievements.description: Obtain a free Great Ball in Celestic Town for having a Pokemon with high Happiness.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Lucky Number
achievements.description: Show the guy on Route 221 the correct level Pokémon to obtain a Black Belt.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Mysterious Plates
achievements.description: Obtain every Plate at least once.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: An Explosion of Luck
achievements.description: Obtain TM64 Explosion from the Game Corner.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Seven Star Special
achievements.description: Win five battles in the Seven Stars Restaurant in one session without leaving the area.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Clefairy Used Protect!
achievements.description: Defeat either Rich Boy Liam or Rich Girl Celeste in the Trophy House.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Footprints in the Sand
achievements.description: Obtain a Footprint Ribbon from Mr. Footstep.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Smogon Approved
achievements.description: Obtain an Effort Ribbon from the Sunyshore Seal Shop.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Mood Swings
achievements.description: Obtain every Daily Ribbon given by Julia on a single Pokémon and view them in the Summary screen.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Sinnoh's Got Talent
achievements.description: Obtain every Contest Ribbon on a single Pokémon and view them in the Summary screen.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Jack of All Trades
achievements.description: Obtain every Battle Tower Ribbon possible on a single Pokémon and view them in the Summary screen.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Top Percent
achievements.description: Obtain the Gorgeous Royal Ribbon from the Ribbon Society and view it in the Summary screen while there.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Fortune IV
achievements.description: Mine four items in a single wall in the Underground.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Home Away from Home
achievements.description: Fully furnish your Secret Base.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Secret Squares
achievements.description: Have at least one of every trap in your Underground inventory, excluding multiplayer traps and the Digger Drill.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Millions Well Spent
achievements.description: Buy every piece of furniture for your Resort Area Villa.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Beauty Queen
achievements.description: Obtain at least one of every possible Accessory based on your Starter Pokemon.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: App Enthusiast
achievements.description: Obtain every possible Pokétch App.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Gotta Customize 'Em All!
achievements.description: Obtain one of every Seal, excluding Liquid, Burst, and Twinkle Seals.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Gotta Catch 'Em All - Platinum
achievements.description: Catch all 374 possible Pokemon which are obtainable in the game without external devices.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Running for the Hills
achievements.description: Reach 99,999 steps on the Pokétch Step Counter app.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Cleanliness Is Next to Champion-ess
achievements.description: Reach the maximum level of shine on all 8 of your Gym Badges.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: You've Met a Terrible Fate...
achievements.description: Encounter a ghost in the Old Chateau.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Swamp Advertising
achievements.description: Get laughed at by a Croagunk.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Where's My Cake At?
achievements.description: After defeating the Elite Four, talk to Lucas or Dawn in Sandgem Town on your birthday.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: A Special Occasion
achievements.description: Stay in Snowpoint City for at least two minutes during Diamond Dust.
achievements.author: Blazekickn
